data.title: Elon Musk says Tesla could create 'Atom-Shaping' AGI robots first, setting pace in AI race. Tesla (TSLA) involved.
data.description: The CEO of Tesla, Inc., Elon Musk, is confident that the company could be one of the first to develop artificial general intelligence (AGI) and implement it into humanoid robots. He believes that Tesla is a leading contender in achieving human-level AI and shaping it into humanoid form. In a recent post, Musk stated that Tesla aims to create AGI and potentially be the pioneer in crafting it into humanoid/atom-shaping structure. This ambitious goal showcases Musk's vision for the future of AI technology. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Fibocom & du's AI CPE at MWC 2026 integrates 5G and AI, enhancing data interaction for families.
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain on March 4, 2026, at the 2026 Mobile World Congress (MWC), Fibocom&du's ALL-IN-ONE AI CPE solution gained prominence featured significant upgrades, including an AI NAS enhancement. This advancement further solidified the convergence of 5G, AI, and practical applications, capturing the interest of attendees. The upgrade heralds a new era...

data.title: UK lawmakers question Coinbase exec on stablecoins, KYC, and bank runs. Concerns over stablecoins draining bank deposits and risk to financial stability. Strict regulations may drive innovation abroad.
data.description: Legislators are questioning the potential for stablecoins to siphon off bank deposits and create financial instability. Meanwhile, Coinbase and Innovate Finance have cautioned against overly stringent regulations, citing the risk of pushing innovation overseas. It is a delicate balance as regulators seek to ensure financial stability without stifling growth.

data.title: eClinicalWorks & Sunoh.ai save rural pediatricians 2+ hours/day. Kidzcare Pediatrics in TN reclaiming time with AI scribe.
data.description: In Westborough, Massachusetts, eClinicalWorks, the largest ambulatory cloud EHR provider, revealed that Kidzcare Pediatrics in rural Tennessee has been able to save more than two hours each day with the integration of Sunoh.ai - a top AI medical scribe - into the eClinicalWorks EHR system. This innovative solution assists in simplifying clinical documentation and coding processes, seamlessly blending into current workflows. It aids healthcare providers in cutting down on administrative tasks, reducing after-hours work, and enabling them to concentrate better on patient care.

data.title: Mercer Advisors in Denver launch Women & Wealth practice, dedicated to supporting and advancing women.
data.description: Mercer Advisors has introduced its Women & Wealth practice in Denver, a specialized team focused on supporting and empowering women. This initiative reflects the company's dedication to promoting gender equality and inclusivity.

data.title: Investors assess energy price impact as global markets stabilize. Stocks in Asia fall sharply while Europe and US remain steady.
data.description: Following days of instability, the markets in Europe and the United States have shown signs of stabilization. However, Asian stocks experienced a significant drop in value.

data.title: Tesla sees sales increase in Europe, stock down 3% this week after testing support.
data.description: Last month, Tesla experienced a rise in new car registrations across multiple European countries. This positive trend comes as a boost amidst the stock's recent decline of around 3% this week. The company's sales in Europe are showing signs of recovery, reflecting a potential turnaround in their performance.

data.title: CrowdStrike stock fluctuated after beating Q4 earnings with fiscal 2027 guidance above expectations.
data.description: CrowdStrike's stock experienced fluctuations as investors considered the magnitude of a Q4 earnings surpass and fiscal 2027 guidance, which slightly exceeded expectations. The company's key metric was enhanced by the 'Falcon Flex' financing, contributing to overall growth.

data.title: Landsbankinn hf.'s Annual General Meeting set for March 18, 2026 at Reykjastræti 6, Reykjavík at 16:00.
data.description: Landsbankinn hf. has announced that its Annual General Meeting is scheduled for Wednesday, March 18, 2026, at 16:00. The meeting will take place at Reykjastræti 6, Reykjavík.

data.title: Avantus secures $300M financing from BBVA and CIBC for Kitt Solar & Energy Storage Project in Pinal County, Arizona.
data.description: Avantus recently secured a financing package exceeding $300 million from Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria (BBVA) and Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce, New York Branch (CIBC) for their Kitt Solar and Energy Storage Project, based in Pinal County, Arizona. The project includes a significant capacity of 100 MWac/130 MWdc of solar power and 400 MWh of energy storage. This funding encompasses various financial components such as construction support, a tax equity bridge loan, and letters of credit.

data.title: Bitcoin surged 5% despite Iran conflict; Goldman Sachs CEO surprised by market's calmness. Cumulative impacts may take weeks to digest.
data.description: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon expressed surprise at the calm market response to the Iran conflict, noting that it may take a couple of weeks for investors to fully comprehend the impact. Solomon highlighted the 5% surge in Bitcoin amidst the conflict. Speaking at a business summit in Sydney, he stated that the market's reaction seemed "benign" considering the gravity of the situation. Solomon mentioned that markets typically react minimally to geopolitical events unless they affect economic growth directly. He emphasized a cumulative effect of current events that could lead to a more significant market response. Solomon expressed concerns about the delayed reaction from investors. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global tariffs set to increase to 15% this week, predicts Treasury Secretary; rates to return to pre-ruling levels in five months.
data.description: According to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, the overall tariff rates, which saw a decrease following a recent Supreme Court decision, are expected to return to their original levels in the next five months.
